chapter_title.en: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Ibrahim Ibn Hashim

text:
ه عن إبراهيم بن هاشم فقد رويته عن أبي؛ و محمّد بن الحسن- رضي اللّه عنهما- عن سعد بن عبد اللّه؛ و عبد اللّه بن جعفر الحميريّ جميعا عن إبراهيم بن هاشم.
و رويته عن محمّد بن موسى بن المتوكّل- رضي اللّه عنه- عن عليّ بن إبراهيم، عن أبيه إبراهيم بن هاشم‌.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: And whatever is narrated from Ibrahim ibn Hashim, I have narrated it from my father and from Muhammad ibn Al-Hasan - may Allah (swt) be pleased with them - from Saʿd ibn Abdullah and Abdullah ibn Jafar Al-Himyari together, from Ibrahim ibn Hashim. And I have also narrated it from Muhammad ibn Musa ibn Al-Mutawakkil - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Ali ibn Ibrahim, from his father Ibrahim ibn Hashim.
